case_title: MINYI LIANG VS. ANH TRONG HO

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF NO SERVICE DATE INDICATED ON CERT MAIL CARD, TODAY'S DATE USED AS SERVICE DATE SERVED DEC-06-2021, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HO, ANH TRONG
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT. FILED BY LIANG, MINYI HO, ANH TRONG

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIANG, MINYI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HO, ANH TRONG $630.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $695.00, DEFENDANT'S TESTIMONY IS INCONSISTENT WITH VEHICLE DAMAGE THAT SUPPORTS FINDING THAT HE LEFT THE MIDDLE LANE AND MADE IMPACT TO PLAINTIFF'S VEHICLE IN THE FURTHEST RIGHT LANE NORTH ON PRESIDIO. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY LIANG, MINYI AS TO DEFENDANT HO, ANH TRONG ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-14-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-14-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-14-2021 BY PANG LY. PLAINTIFF MINYI LIANG IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY NON-CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER VIVIAN CHOI (FRIEND). DEFENDANT ANH TRONG HO IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY CERTIFIED VIETNAMESE COURT INTERPRETER LINH MUSFELT. CHI HO APPEARS AS WITNESS (DAUGHTER) FOR DEFENDANT. BOTH PARTIES STIPULATED TO ALLOW THEIR CASE TO BE HEARD BEFORE A PRO TEM JUDGE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-14-2021 - JUDGMENT.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIANG, MINYI AS TO DEFENDANT HO, ANH TRONG
